{!imgError ? ( setImgError(true)} /> ) : ( {person.initials} )}
); } const highlights = [ { icon: '≡ƒî┐', label: 'Eco-friendly Green Campus' }, { icon: '≡ƒö¼', label: 'State-of-the-art Science Laboratories' }, { icon: '≡ƒÆ╗', label: 'Modern Computing Facilities' }, { icon: '≡ƒôÜ', label: 'Well-stocked Central Library' }, { icon: '≡ƒÅå', label: 'Record Placement Track Record' }, { icon: '≡ƒæ¿ΓÇì≡ƒÅ½', label: 'Experienced & Trained Faculty' }, { icon: '≡ƒÄ»', label: 'Campus Placement Training' }, { icon: '≡ƒÄù∩╕Å', label: 'Active NCC & NSS Units' }, { icon: '≡ƒ¢á∩╕Å', label: 'Project & Activity Clubs' }, { icon: '≡ƒì╜∩╕Å', label: 'Hygienic Canteen Facilities' }, { icon: '≡ƒÜî', label: 'Transportation Facility Available' }, { icon: '≡ƒùú∩╕Å', label: 'Regular Career Guidance Seminars' }, ]; const infrastructure = [ { no: '01', name: 'Main Academic Block', dept: 'Administrative Office, Admission Cell, Principal\'s Office', icon: '≡ƒÅ¢∩╕Å', }, { no: '02', name: 'Science Block', dept: 'Physics, Chemistry, Botany, and Zoology Labs', icon: '≡ƒö¡', }, { no: '03', name: 'Commerce & Arts Wing', dept: 'Commerce, Arts, and Management Classrooms', icon: '≡ƒôè', }, { no: '04', name: 'Computer Lab Block', dept: 'IT & Computer Science Laboratories, Digital Library', icon: '≡ƒûÑ∩╕Å', }, ]; const stats = [ { value: '2005', label: 'Est. Year' }, { value: '2000+', label: 'Alumni' }, { value: '85+', label: 'Faculty' }, { value: '12+', label: 'Programs' }, ]; export default function AboutPage() { return (

Vizianagaram ┬╖ Andhra Pradesh ┬╖ Est. 2005

S.K. Degree & P.G. College

Established in 2005 in Vizianagaram, Andhra Pradesh, S.K. Degree & P.G. College stands as a distinguished centre of higher learning ΓÇö committed to academic excellence, character building, and the holistic development of every student.

{/* Stat bar */}

{s.value}

{s.label}

))}
{/* ΓòÉΓòÉΓòÉΓòÉΓòÉΓòÉΓòÉΓòÉΓòÉΓòÉΓòÉΓòÉΓòÉΓòÉΓòÉΓòÉΓòÉΓòÉΓòÉΓòÉΓòÉΓòÉΓòÉΓòÉΓòÉΓòÉΓòÉΓòÉΓòÉΓòÉΓòÉΓòÉΓòÉΓòÉΓòÉΓòÉ LEGACY ΓòÉΓòÉΓòÉΓòÉΓòÉΓòÉΓòÉΓòÉΓòÉΓòÉΓòÉΓòÉΓòÉΓòÉΓòÉΓòÉΓòÉΓòÉΓòÉΓòÉΓòÉΓòÉΓòÉΓòÉΓòÉΓòÉΓòÉΓòÉΓòÉΓòÉΓòÉΓòÉΓòÉΓòÉΓòÉΓòÉ */}
Our Legacy

Two Decades of
Academic Excellence

In 2005, a group of passionate educators dared to dream ΓÇö and that dream became{' '} S.K. Degree & P.G. College. Founded under the{' '} Arunodaya Educational Society, what started as a vision for quality education in Vizianagaram has quietly grown, over twenty years, into an institution that thousands of students and families have come to trust.

We are permanently affiliated to Andhra University and carry all necessary government recognitions ΓÇö but what we are most proud of is simpler than that: students who came here unsure of themselves, and left ready for the world.

Whether it is Science, Commerce, or Management, every programme we offer is backed by modern laboratories, a well-stocked library, and computing facilities that are among the finest in the district. We have always believed that students deserve the best environment to learn in ΓÇö and that belief has never changed.

{/* Decorative card */}

20+

Years of Trust

    {[ 'Permanently Affiliated to Andhra University', 'Registered Arunodaya Educational Society', 'Specialized Career Guidance & Placement Cell', 'Communication Skills & Spoken English Labs', '2000+ Alumni Network Worldwide', 'Skill-Based Vocational Training Programs' ].map((item) => (

    • ))}

Leadership

The Faces Behind Our Vision

{/* Decorative circle */}
Why S.K. College

What Makes Us Special

{highlights.map((h) => (
{h.icon} {h.label}
))}
{/* ΓòÉΓòÉΓòÉΓòÉΓòÉΓòÉΓòÉΓòÉΓòÉΓòÉΓòÉΓòÉΓòÉΓòÉΓòÉΓòÉΓòÉΓòÉΓòÉΓòÉΓòÉΓòÉΓòÉΓòÉΓòÉΓòÉΓòÉΓòÉΓòÉΓòÉΓòÉΓòÉΓòÉΓòÉΓòÉΓòÉ APPROVALS ΓòÉΓòÉΓòÉΓòÉΓòÉΓòÉΓòÉΓòÉΓòÉΓòÉΓòÉΓòÉΓòÉΓòÉΓòÉΓòÉΓòÉΓòÉΓòÉΓòÉΓòÉΓòÉΓòÉΓòÉΓòÉΓòÉΓòÉΓòÉΓòÉΓòÉΓòÉΓòÉΓòÉΓòÉΓòÉΓòÉ */}
Accreditations

Approvals & Recognitions

The college is approved by the Government of Andhra Pradesh and permanently affiliated to Andhra University. We maintain rigorous academic standards and are widely recognised for our contribution to the educational landscape of Vizianagaram district.

import React from 'react'; import Image from 'next/image'; import { Award, Briefcase, GraduationCap, Ship, ShieldCheck, Target } from 'lucide-react'; import placementsData from '@/lib/data/placements.json'; export const metadata = { title: 'Placements & NCC Achievements | S.K. Degree & P.G. College', description: 'Celebrating our student success stories in corporate placements and NCC defense training.', }; export default function AchievementsPage() { return (
{/* Hero Section */}

Legacy of Success

At S.K. Degree & P.G. College, we measure our success by the achievements of our students in the corporate world and their service to the nation.

{/* Placements Section */}
Career Excellence

123+ Candidates Placed
in Top MNCs

Our dedicated placement cell works tirelessly to bridge the gap between academia and industry. Through regular CRT (Campus Recruitment Training) sessions, we ensure our students are industry-ready.

95%

Placement Rate

6 LPA

Highest Package

{placementsData.map((company) => (
{/* Since I don't have actual SVG files, I'll use a stylized text for now to avoid broken images */}
{company.name} {company.industry}
))}
{/* NCC Section */}
Nation First

NCC Excellence

Our NCC wings are the pride of Vizianagaram, consistently producing disciplined leaders for the Indian Armed Forces.

{/* Army Wing */}

Army Wing

Led by Sri V. Sanyasi Naidu (ANO Army), the Army wing focuses on developing character, discipline, and a secular outlook among the youth.

    {['B & C Certificate Training', 'Agniveer Selection Prep', 'Annual Training Camps (ATC)', 'Community Service Initiatives'].map((item) => (
  • {item}
    • ))}
{/* Naval Wing */}

Naval Wing

Led by Sri M. Vishnu Sankar (ANO Navel), our Naval wing provides unique maritime training and opportunities to join the Indian Navy.

    {['Boat Pulling & Sailing', 'Naval RDC Parade Prep', 'Specialized Ship Modeling', 'Sea Training Camps'].map((item) => (
  • {item}
    • ))}
{/* Special Highlight */}

RDC Parade Honors

Our cadets have represented the college at the Republic Day Camp (RDC) in New Delhi, securing top honors among all colleges in the region.

{/* Final CTA */}

Ready to Start Your Success Story?

Join S.K. College Meet Mentors

import { supabase } from '@/lib/supabase'; import { FileText, ExternalLink, ArrowRight, Eye } from 'lucide-react'; import Link from 'next/link'; export const revalidate = 60; export default async function NirfPage() { const { data: documents, error } = await supabase .from('nirf_documents') .select('*') .order('year', { ascending: false }); if (error) { console.error('Error fetching NIRF documents:', error); } return (
{/* Header Section */}

NIRF Rankings

National Institutional Ranking Framework

S.K. Degree & P.G. College participates in the National Institutional Ranking Framework (NIRF) ΓÇö an initiative by the Ministry of Education, Government of India, to rank higher education institutions across the country.

Visit Official NIRF Website
{/* What is NIRF Section */}

What is NIRF?

The National Institutional Ranking Framework (NIRF) was launched on 29th September 2015 by the Ministry of Education, Government of India. It ranks colleges and universities across the country based on five key parameters ΓÇö Teaching & Learning Resources, Research & Professional Practice, Graduation Outcomes, Outreach & Inclusivity, and Perception.

Participation in NIRF reflects our institution's commitment to transparency, accountability, and continuous improvement in the quality of education we provide to our students.

{/* Documents Section */}

NIRF Data & Reports

{documents && documents.length > 0 ? (
{documents.map((doc) => (

Year: {doc.year}

{doc.title}

View PDF
))}
) : (

No documents uploaded yet

Documents will appear here once uploaded from the admin panel.

)}
{/* Bottom Note */}

Data submitted annually to Ministry of Education, Govt. of India

For more information visit nirfindia.org
); }

'use client'; import React from 'react'; import Image from 'next/image'; import Link from 'next/link'; import { Award, MapPin, Users, BookOpen, ArrowRight, CheckCircle2 } from 'lucide-react'; import { motion } from 'framer-motion'; import NoticeCard from '@/components/NoticeCard'; import { Notice, GalleryItem } from '@/lib/types'; import { BrandScroller } from '@/components/ui/brand-scroller'; import NewsSection from '@/components/NewsSection'; import YouTubeFacade from '@/components/YouTubeFacade'; import Footer from '@/components/Footer'; import TestimonialSection from '@/components/TestimonialSection'; import dynamic from 'next/dynamic'; const ThreeBackground = dynamic(() => import('@/components/Visuals').then(mod => mod.ThreeBackground), { ssr: false, loading: () =>
}); import { supabase } from '@/lib/supabase'; const fadeIn = { hidden: { opacity: 0, y: 20 }, visible: { opacity: 1, y: 0, transition: { duration: 0.8, ease: "easeOut" as const } } }; export default function LandingPage() { const [photoGallery, setPhotoGallery] = React.useState([]); const [videoGallery, setVideoGallery] = React.useState([]); const [recentNotices, setRecentNotices] = React.useState([]); const [activeTab, setActiveTab] = React.useState<'text' | 'video'>('text'); React.useEffect(() => { const fetchGallery = async () => { const { data, error } = await supabase .from('gallery') .select('*') .order('created_at', { ascending: false }); if (!error && data) { setPhotoGallery(data.filter((item: GalleryItem) => item.category !== 'Video').slice(0, 6)); setVideoGallery(data.filter((item: GalleryItem) => item.category === 'Video').slice(0, 3)); } }; const fetchNotices = async () => { const { data, error } = await supabase .from('notices') .select('*') .order('is_pinned', { ascending: false }) .order('date', { ascending: false }) .limit(3); if (!error && data) { setRecentNotices(data as Notice[]); } }; fetchGallery(); fetchNotices(); }, []); return (

Part of
